[ch]A7[/ch]   [ch]A7sus[/ch] [ch]A7[/ch]

[Verse 1]

   Things haven't been the same     since you came into my life[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Bm7b5[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]A7[/ch]                    [ch]A7sus[/ch]    [ch]A7[/ch]

[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]           [ch]A7sus[/ch]            [ch]Dm7[/ch]

[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Bm7b5[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Dm7[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]Bm7b5[/ch]      [ch]A7sus[/ch]  [ch]A7[/ch]
